parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony <info@faithandharmonyllc.com>', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: $json.email_subject, html: $json.email_html }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'sms', to: $env.FOUNDER_PHONE, message: $json.sms_message }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'overdue', updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony <info@faithandharmonyllc.com>', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: $json.email_subject, html: $json.email_html }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'sms', to: $env.FOUNDER_PHONE, message: $json.sms_message }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ obligation_name: $json.obligation_name, category: $json.category, description: $json.description, due_date: $json.due_date, recurrence: $json.recurrence, status: $json.status, owner: $json.owner, source_document: $json.source_document, notes: $json.notes }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'compliance_sentinel', event_type: 'reminder', summary: 'Sent ' + $json.threshold + ' reminder for ' + $json.obligation_name + ' (due ' + $json.due_date + ')', data_snapshot: { id: $json.id, obligation_name: $json.obligation_name, category: $json.category, due_date: $json.due_date, status: $json.status, threshold: $json.threshold, days_until_due: $json.days_until_due, owner: $json.owner, description: $json.description }, quarter: $json.current_quarter, fiscal_year: $json.fiscal_year }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'compliance_sentinel', event_type: 'reminder', summary: 'Sent 14-day escalation for ' + $json.obligation_name + ' (due ' + $json.due_date + ') - email + SMS', data_snapshot: { id: $json.id, obligation_name: $json.obligation_name, category: $json.category, due_date: $json.due_date, status: $json.status, threshold: $json.threshold, days_until_due: $json.days_until_due, owner: $json.owner, description: $json.description }, quarter: $json.current_quarter, fiscal_year: $json.fiscal_year }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'compliance_sentinel', event_type: 'status_change', summary: 'Marked ' + $json.obligation_name + ' as OVERDUE (was due ' + $json.due_date + ')', data_snapshot: { id: $json.id, obligation_name: $json.obligation_name, category: $json.category, due_date: $json.due_date, previous_status: $json.status, new_status: 'overdue', owner: $json.owner, description: $json.description }, quarter: $json.current_quarter, fiscal_year: $json.fiscal_year }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'compliance_sentinel', event_type: 'reminder', summary: 'Sent overdue reminder for ' + $json.obligation_name + ' (was due ' + $json.due_date + ') - email + SMS', data_snapshot: { id: $json.id, obligation_name: $json.obligation_name, category: $json.category, due_date: $json.due_date, status: $json.status, threshold: $json.threshold, days_until_due: $json.days_until_due, owner: $json.owner, description: $json.description }, quarter: $json.current_quarter, fiscal_year: $json.fiscal_year }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'compliance_sentinel', event_type: 'status_change', summary: 'Auto-renewed ' + $json.obligation_name + ' (' + $json.recurrence + ') - next due ' + $json.due_date, data_snapshot: { obligation_name: $json.obligation_name, category: $json.category, recurrence: $json.recurrence, new_due_date: $json.due_date, notes: $json.notes }, quarter: 'Q' + (Math.floor(new Date().getMonth() / 3) + 1), fiscal_year: new Date().getFullYear() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony <info@faithandharmonyllc.com>', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: $json.email_subject, html: $json.email_html }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'sms', to: $env.FOUNDER_PHONE, message: $json.sms_message }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony <info@faithandharmonyllc.com>', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: $json.email_subject, html: $json.email_html }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'overdue', updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony <info@faithandharmonyllc.com>', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: $json.email_subject, html: $json.email_html }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'sms', to: $env.FOUNDER_PHONE, message: $json.sms_message }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'compliance_sentinel', event_type: 'reminder', summary: 'Daily scan: sent ' + $json.threshold + ' reminder for ' + $json.obligation_name + ' (due ' + $json.due_date + ')', data_snapshot: { id: $json.id, obligation_name: $json.obligation_name, category: $json.category, due_date: $json.due_date, status: $json.status, threshold: $json.threshold, days_until_due: $json.days_until_due, owner: $json.owner }, quarter: $json.current_quarter, fiscal_year: $json.fiscal_year }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, temperature: 0, system: 'You are a governance compliance reporter for Faith & Harmony LLC. Format the following compliance obligation data into a professional weekly status summary. Include a status overview (counts by status), upcoming deadlines section, overdue items section (if any), and a brief executive summary. Use clear, direct language. No marketing fluff.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.obligations_data) }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ expiresIn: 604800 }) }}

parameters.body:
=--gsd_boundary
Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8

{{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.file_name, parents: [$env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID], mimeType: 'application/pdf' }) }}
--gsd_boundary
Content-Type: application/pdf
Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64

{{ $json.pdf_base64 }}
--gsd_boundary--

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony ', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: 'Weekly Compliance Status - ' + $json.week_label, html: '

Weekly Compliance Status - ' + $json.week_label + '

' + ($json.obligations_summary || '').replace(//g, '>') + '

Download PDF Report

Compliance Sentinel | Faith & Harmony LLC | Automated Governance System

' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'compliance_sentinel', event_type: 'summary_generated', summary: 'Weekly compliance summary generated for ' + $json.week_label, document_url: $env.SUPABASE_URL + '/storage/v1' + ($json.signedURL || ''), data_snapshot: $json.obligations_data, quarter: 'Q' + Math.ceil((new Date().getMonth() + 1) / 3), fiscal_year: new Date().getFullYear() }) }}

meta.notes: Complete Compliance Sentinel workflow. Plan 02-01: dual triggers, scan, threshold routing, notifications, auto-renewal, logging. Plan 02-02: weekly summary pipeline (Claude AI formatting, PDF generation, Supabase Storage upload + signed URL, Google Drive backup, Resend email delivery, summary log entry).
